summary.zh: 涡轮增压引擎主导的年代：车队在 4 缸以内的小排量涡轮机上追求越来越高的增压压力，直到 1988 年 2.5 巴增压与 150 升燃油的严格限制，为 1989 年全面转向 3.5 升自然吸气收官。
summary.en: The turbocharged decade: teams pushed small-displacement turbo engines to ever-higher boost, until 1988's strict 2.5-bar boost and 150-litre fuel limits closed the era ahead of the full switch to 3.5-litre naturally aspirated engines in 1989.
